title: ICAI Plans Future-Ready CA Syllabus with AI, Data Analytics & ESG Integration
content:
# ICAI Plans Future-Ready CA Syllabus with AI, Data Analytics & ESG Integration

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne future CA syllabus changes discuss kiye hain, jismein Artificial Intelligence (AI), Data Analytics, aur Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) jaise critical areas ko integrate karne ka plan hai.

**Key Highlights:**

*   **Syllabus Modernization:** ICAI aims to align the Chartered Accountancy program with the rapidly evolving technological and professional requirements in the finance and accounting sector.
*   **New Subjects:** Currently, AI, Data Analytics, ESG reporting, sustainability, and forensic auditing formally CA curriculum ka part nahi hain. ICAI in subjects ko integrate karna chahta hai to make future CAs industry-relevant.
*   **Why the Change?:** ICAI President Prasanna Kumar D ne emphasize kiya hai ki AI ab finance professionals ke liye integral requirement ban chuka hai, aur iske knowledge ke bina, koi bhi Chartered Accountant survive nahi kar sakta.
*   **Review Committee:** Is major revamp ko facilitate karne ke liye, ICAI ne **Committee for Review of Education and Training (CRET)** constitute kiya hai. Ye committee curriculum revision, practical training (articleship), soft skills, aur examination process par comprehensive review karegi.
*   **Implementation Timeline:** CRET se December 2026 tak apni recommendations submit karne ki expectation hai. Uske baad, proposed changes ko public consultation ke liye release kiya jaayega, aur revised curriculum 2028 se implement hone ki ummeed hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/)

*Published on: 23 May 2026*
